reasoning: Tohoku sakura query but tool was scoped to Akita only; visible top-5 (大湯環状列石, 抱返り渓谷, 秋田美術館, 八郎潟, 田沢湖) are valid Akita entities but none are sakura-meisho. Expected 角館/弘前公園/三春滝桜/北上展勝地 entirely absent in shown content. Schema includes qid, coords, heritage labels — solid. No sakura_meisho_100 kind boost, no Tohoku-region expansion.

reasoning: Query asks for Niigata sake breweries; tool returns MAFF GI agricultural products (くろさき茶豆, 津南雪下にんじん, 大口れんこん) — wrong category. Expected 八海山/久保田/越乃寒梅 entirely absent. reasoning: Hakuba ski + onsen query. Returns only 5 thin results: a news page about UN Tourism designation, 白馬大池 (a lake in 小谷村), 白馬三枝美術館, 白馬五竜高山植物園 (no coords), and a generic spots-index page (quality 0.36). 白馬八方尾根, Goryu ski, Happo-One, any onsen ryokan completely absent. reasoning: Kansai autumn foliage. Returns canonical Kyoto temples 二条城, 東寺, 西本願寺, 仁和寺 — heritage-rich but not foliage-specific. Expected 嵐山/東福寺/永観堂 not visible in top-4. Multilingual labels, full heritage_designations, 4-language coverage exemplary. Tool scoped to Kyoto only — does not aggregate Kansai region.

reasoning: Nara sakura query. 吉野山 surfaces first with sakura_meisho_100 kind, prominence_score 1, full multilingual labels, 3 heritage designations — textbook ideal. Other Nara temples follow. Expected 嵐山/醍醐寺 are out of Nara prefecture so absent by design. Within scope this is excellent.
missing_entities: 醍醐寺, 嵐山, 哲学の道

reasoning: Okinawa stargazing on remote islands. Returns Naha-area heritage (玉陵, 首里城, 中城城, 斎場御嶽) — accurate, but none are 離島 / dark-sky / stargazing entities. 石垣島/西表島/波照間 absent. Schema and provenance excellent but query intent missed.

reasoning: Hokkaido rural onsen ryokan. Top results from 日本秘湯を守る会 (知内温泉, 銀婚湯, 凌雲閣, 湧駒荘) are exactly the canonical answer with rich designation_jp/en, source URLs. reasoning: Setouchi islands query. Returns Kagawa flagship sights: 栗林公園, 満濃池, 丸亀城, 高松城 — all accurate, heritage-tagged, but not the queried Setouchi islands. 直島/小豆島/豊島 — the canonical Setouchi art islands — absent in top-4. Data quality high.

reasoning: Tokushima indigo dyeing workshops. Returns 阿波正藍しじら織 (relevant — uses indigo), 大谷焼 (pottery, irrelevant), 阿波和紙 (mentions 藍染 in description). 阿波藍 the dye itself, and any workshop venues (古庄染工場, 藍住町歴史館) absent. see_also 大塚国際美術館 unrelated noise. Multilingual translations excellent.
